name: Online Image → Set Url
description: Change the URL where the image is downloaded from. A re-download will be automatically triggered unless `update` is set to `false`.

config_entries.label: URL
config_entries.description: The new URL to download the image from.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The image to update the URL for.

config_entries.label: Update
config_entries.description: If `true`, the image will be updated (fetched) immediately after setting the new URL. If `false`, the URL will be set but the image will **not** be updated until you call the `update` action. Defaults to `true`
